title: Generation Station: every screen
description: From creating the plant, through the wizard, to the twin, the SLD and funding.

steps.title: Your plants
steps.description: Each plant carries site, technology, electrical and finance config.
steps.voiceScript: Each utility-scale plant you create is listed here.
steps.captionText: Each utility-scale plant you create is listed here.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your plants: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Create a plant
steps.voiceScript: Creating a plant starts the fourteen-step wizard.
steps.captionText: Creating a plant starts the fourteen-step wizard.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create a plant: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open a plant
steps.description: The project screen is the hub for every output.
steps.voiceScript: Let us open an existing plant.
steps.captionText: Let us open an existing plant.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open a plant: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: The 14 steps
steps.description: Step 7 commits the PV sizing everything else depends on.
steps.voiceScript: Work through the fourteen steps. Step seven commits the PV sizing.
steps.captionText: Work through the fourteen steps. Step seven commits the PV sizing.
steps.fallbackMessage: The 14 steps: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Cost Plan Deck
steps.voiceScript: The cost plan deck summarises capital cost for your investors.
steps.captionText: The cost plan deck summarises capital cost for your investors.
steps.fallbackMessage: Cost Plan Deck: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open the 3D twin
steps.description: The plant you designed, in three dimensions.
steps.voiceScript: Now we open the three-D digital twin of the plant.
steps.captionText: Now we open the three-D digital twin of the plant.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open the 3D twin: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Orbit the plant
steps.description: Drag to orbit, scroll to zoom, click to inspect.
steps.voiceScript: Drag to orbit and scroll to zoom around your plant.
steps.captionText: Drag to orbit and scroll to zoom around your plant.
steps.fallbackMessage: Orbit the plant: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Run the simulation
steps.description: Recomputes shading, yield and the BOQ.
steps.voiceScript: Running the simulation recomputes shading, yield and the bill of quantities.
steps.captionText: Running the simulation recomputes shading, yield and the bill of quantities.
steps.fallbackMessage: Run the simulation: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open the single-line diagram
steps.voiceScript: From the outputs rail we open the electrical single-line diagram.
steps.captionText: From the outputs rail we open the electrical single-line diagram.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open the single-line diagram: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: The one-line
steps.description: Array to grid, drawn from the committed sizing.
steps.voiceScript: This is the plant's one-line, from the array all the way to the grid.
steps.captionText: This is the plant's one-line, from the array all the way to the grid.
steps.fallbackMessage: The one-line: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Project funding
steps.description: Package the design for a financial institution.
steps.voiceScript: Finally, project funding packages the design for a bank.
steps.captionText: Finally, project funding packages the design for a bank.
steps.fallbackMessage: Funding: open it from the project screen.

steps.title: Submit for funding
steps.description: Consent first; nothing is shared until you do.
steps.voiceScript: Give consent and submit. Nothing is shared with a bank until you consent.
steps.captionText: Give consent and submit. Nothing is shared with a bank until you consent.
steps.fallbackMessage: Submit for funding: not visible on this screen yet.
